notes: Valheim Data browser learns two new tricks. (1) Best Weapon — every creature now shows which weapon type to use against it, read from its damage resistances (e.g. Bear → Slash: swords, axes or knives), with elemental soft-spots flagged too. (2) Bait & Fish — each fish lists the bait that catches it ("Caught With"), and each bait lists its fish ("Catches"), both clickable to jump between them. Tickets 20260621-133958-038e16fc and 20260621-133714-0a3b7ee5.
